front: Musical: 'The truth is I never left you' — Eva sings this from the balcony of the Casa Rosada in this Andrew Lloyd Webber musical
back: "Don't Cry for Me, Argentina" from Evita

front: Musical: Opening number sung during Eva's funeral by Che Guevara, featuring the Salve Regina
Musical: Men hiding behind raised newspapers sing about the mixed results of a woman's visits to Spain and Italy in this number
Musical: Song written specifically for the 1996 Madonna film adaptation of Evita
Musical: Eva is accused of being 'short-sighted' for having 'no impossible dream' during a ballroom dance number in Evita
Musical: A cinema screening is interrupted by a declaration that Eva 'entered immortality' in this Evita number
Musical: Actress who won her first Best Actress Tony for playing Eva Peron in Evita
Musical: Evita was co-written by Tim Rice and this composer of Jesus Christ Superstar, The Phantom of the Opera, and Cats
Musical: Actress who starred as Eva Peron in the 1996 film adaptation of Evita
Musical: 2023 Broadway musical about Imelda Marcos that has been compared to Evita for glorifying a despotic female politician
Musical: Eva Peron coined this term (meaning 'shirtless ones') for her husband Juan's supporters
Musical: Rally at which Eva Peron was encouraged to run for Vice President but declined
Musical: Doctor who embalmed Eva Peron's body, which was secretly buried in Milan and disappeared for almost 20 years
